chunks.text: 1 | P a g e HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D-2896 of 2012 Present Before Mr. Justice Mohammad Ali Mazhar Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Sohail and others, petitioners: Choudhry Azhar Ilahi, advocate through Respondent No.1 through: Shaikh Liaquat Hussain Standing Counsel Respondent No.2 through: Mr. Mohammad Sarfaraz Sulehry, advocate Date of Hearing: 13-12-2016 Date of Order: 13-12-2016 O R D E R MOHAMMAD ALI MAZHAR---J., Learned counsel submits that though the petitioners have approached this Court for implementation of the directives of Prime Minister dated 30-03-2012 for regularization of the contract employees and the appointment on son quota but in the meanwhile, the KPT entered into a settlement with the Collective Bargaining Agent in the year 2014 and settlement was made effective from 01.04.2014 to 31.03.2016. The learned counsel submits in the identical petition filed for appointment on son quota, this Court has already disposed of C.P No.D-4209 of 2012 on 26-05-2016. He has placed the copy of the order on record. The learned counsel for the respondent No.2 has seen the order and he has no objection if this petition is disposed of in the same terms. This petition is disposed of in terms of paragraph-4 of the order dated 26-05-2016 passed in C.P No.D-4209 of 2012 which reads as follows:- 2 | P a g e “4. By consent this petition is disposed of with the directions to the respondents to consider the case of the Petitioners in terms of Charter of Demand No. 49 and the decision taken on it within Ninety days. The Respondents will consider each case individually. The Manager (H.R) has assured that H.R Department will issue proforma to all the Petitioners so that they may submit the same along with all required documents for the consideration of the management.

The Respondents will consider each case individually. The Manager (H.R) has assured that H.R Department will issue proforma to all the Petitioners so that they may submit the same along with all required documents for the consideration of the management. The compliance report shall be submitted through M.I.T-II after expiry of stipulated time. J u d g e J u d g e BrohiPS
